nodes.name: brownfield-fullstack.yaml
nodes.summary: Agent workflow for enhancing existing full-stack applications, routing enhancement requests through scope classification (single story, small epic, or major enhancement) to the appropriate planning and implementation path.

nodes.name: brownfield-service.yaml
nodes.summary: Agent workflow for adding features or making changes to an existing backend service or API, handling existing system analysis, integration risk assessment, and story creation.

nodes.name: brownfield-ui.yaml
nodes.summary: Agent workflow for enhancing an existing UI layer, coordinating front-end spec updates, component analysis, and incremental story delivery without disrupting the current user experience.

nodes.name: greenfield-fullstack.yaml
nodes.summary: Agent workflow for building a new full-stack application from scratch, sequencing analyst, PM, UX, and architect agents through brief, PRD, front-end spec, architecture, and story creation phases.

nodes.name: greenfield-service.yaml
nodes.summary: Agent workflow for creating a new backend service or API from scratch, guiding agents through requirements gathering, service architecture design, and epic/story decomposition.

nodes.name: greenfield-ui.yaml
nodes.summary: Agent workflow for building a new UI application from scratch, sequencing UX specification, optional AI UI generation, front-end architecture, and story creation for a standalone front-end project.

edges.label: fullstack workflow encompasses service workflow patterns
fullstack workflow encompasses UI workflow patterns
brownfield fullstack delegates to service workflow
brownfield fullstack delegates to UI workflow
greenfield and brownfield are parallel workflow variants
